name: spec-tests-first
description: Spec-Driven Development cycle for Claude Code (v2): spec → build → review → fix → validate → ship. Six self-contained skills with per-AC red-green-refactor inside /sdd:build, an in-cycle code-review phase (code-quality + security in parallel), and an interactive fix phase with revert-on-regression. Stack-aware test-layout profiles (12 built-in plus a custom fallback) with monorepo support. Zero external plugin dependencies — inline git + gh in /sdd:ship.
